name: corcept_hook_before_run
title: Corcept Hook: BeforeRun
description: ADR-0006 BeforeRun hook — fires when a run contract activates, before any tool use or model emission. Authority: Observe. Trust ceiling: Reviewed. Hook input JSON arrives on stdin (BeforeRunInput shape: run_contract, run_contract_fingerprint, trigger_type, trigger_payload_sha256, optional bindings).
